title: ЭП2Д addon for MTR
description: Pack adds russian EP2D sub-urban electric train and diffirent liveries of it to MTR mod
body:
Higher and wider than built-in MTR trains. Catenary high is 7 blocks. Please use catenary poles and rails from [Slavic Railroad Pack](https://rumtr.miraheze.org/wiki/Slavic_Railroad_Pack). Low platform (most popular type in Russia) must be built using slabs, for high platforms use [Bits And Chisels](https://modrinth.com/mod/bits-and-chisels).

**NOT COMPATIBLE TO DEFAULT MTR PLATFORM BLOCKS!** Only put them under your platform to let the doors open. Only 2-12 car trains are possible, same as in real life. Use 0.8m/s² acceleration.

## **Included liveries:**
- 0069 ЦППК (Fictional)
- 0108 РЭКС
- 0123 КЖД
- 0201 РЖД
- 0298 УЖД (Fictional)
- 0299 Old ЦППК (Fictional)
- 0087 РЭКС for high platforms (Fictional)
- 0177 ЦППК for high platforms
- 0188 РЖД for high platforms (Fictional)

### **REQUIRES NTE!**

Questions and support - @omnihoundnew on Discord
